headline: A Look At Texas Pacific Land’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent share performance and business profile Texas Pacific Land (TPL) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 4.9% decline over the past day and a 10.1% decline over the past week. Over the past month the stock shows an 11.3% decline, while the past 3 months reflect a 9% gain and the year-to-date return stands at 33.9%. The latest close was US$399.08. Texas Pacific Land Corporation operates through two main businesses: land and resource...
